tag.sandbox: Built-in optional SandboxExtension tag; not registered in the default oracle Environment.
tag.verbatim: Lexer-level core tag; it has no token parser registration in the default Environment.

function.attribute: Core expression helper available before it was represented by a normal callable registration.
function.block: Core expression helper available before it was represented by a normal callable registration.
function.dump: Official DebugExtension function; not registered in the default production Environment.
function.parent: Core expression helper available before it was represented by a normal callable registration.

test.true: Documented literal alias whose historical registration differs from its language availability.

operator.?: Conditional-expression syntax rather than a standalone registered expression parser.
operator.?:: Elvis conditional-expression syntax rather than a standalone registered expression parser.
operator.xor: Historical runtime registries omit this documented logical operator.
operator.=>: Arrow/mapping syntax token rather than a standalone registered expression parser.
Spread syntax predates its exposure through the expression-parser registry.
Member-access syntax token rather than a standalone registered expression parser.
operator.|: Filter syntax token rather than a standalone registered expression parser.

operator.(: Internal grouping parser, not a user-facing completion operator.
operator.[: Internal subscript parser, not a user-facing completion operator.
operator.literal: Internal literal parser, not a user-facing completion operator.
